---
type: React Component
title: Post Link.Generated
description: PostLink is a React component within the layout-navigation grouping of the marketing web app template, providing a link element used to route users to individual post or article pages from listing or reference contexts elsewhere in the site.
level: component
icon: fe-component.svg
owner: contentful/team-workflows
ddd_subdomain: supporting
ddd_context: Link Components
ddd_role: Generated Link Component
---

As part of the navigation layer, PostLink is meant to be reused wherever a post needs to be referenced as a clickable destination—such as in blog listings, related-content sections, or summary cards—keeping the linking behavior consistent across those surfaces rather than reimplemented ad hoc at each call site.
